_note: FALLBACK skeleton — replace with your own Act 3 route (hot-reloads on save).
name: Act 3

steps.text: The Sarn Encampment: quests, gems, reward
Do 'A Fixture of Fate' (The Library) — unlocks Siosa, who sells almost every gem
Trials in The Crematorium, The Catacombs and The Imperial Gardens (see the Trials tab)
Kill Dominus, then waypoint to Act 4
